title: lobularia spathulata
intro: Lobularia spathulata, also known as Sweet Alyssum or Sweet Alison, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobularia spathulata include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lobularia spathulata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
